description: Fire was a constant danger in a crowded town or city, even during peace time. In a siege, archers would typically loose flaming arrows over the enemy walls in a bid to set the enemy's buildings on fire.
requirementsTooltip: Unlocked in Empire Phase. Requires “Archery Tradition.”
tooltip:
[font="sans-bold-14"]Give your Archers a strong anti-building attack.
• Archer Infantry +5 crush attack damage.
Archer Infantry +50% slower attack rate.
• Archer Infantry +10 wood cost.[/font]
